description: Perform a ratiometric analysis on the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image. Generate a 32-bit floating-point ratio image (Red Channel / Green Channel) restricted to the cell area defined by the Green channel mask, with background pixels set to 0 or NaN. Save the resulting ratio image to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/ratio_map.tif'. Record the mean intensity of the ratio image within the cell mask to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/mean_ratio.txt'.
